calendar.matters:
Petitioner Noleen Melnikov'S Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel Non-Party Deponents Compliance With Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records And To Seek Leave To Conduct Electronic Discovery
Off Calendar Jul-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Salar Atrizadeh for Petitioner.
Teresa Chow and Scott Koller for OTHER, Non-Party Deponent, City College of San Francisco.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petitioner Noleen Melnikov's Motion To Compel Non-Party Deponents Compliance With Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records And To Seek Leave To Conduct Electronic Discovery is under submission.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

**order signed after hearing**

MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom videonconference):
Salar Atrizadeh, Esq. 310-694-3030 salar@atrizadeh for Plaintiff.
Scott Keller, Esq. for Other Party City College of San Francisco.

The matter is called at 10:07 am. Atty. Scott Keller disappeared from the Zoom hearing when the matter is called.

Petitioner Noleen Melnikov's Amended Motion To Compel Non-Party Deponents Compliance With Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records And To Seek Leave To Conduct Electronic Discovery.

Plaintiff's Counsel do(es) not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro tem to prepare report and recommendation.

An Amended Notice Of Motion For Limited Expedited Discovery
Off Calendar Jul-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing held via Zoom.

Appearances:
Salar Atrizadeh, esq. (310-562-0999) for Petitioner.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Discussion held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER NOLEEN MELNIKOV's Amended Notice Of Motion For Limited Expedited Discovery is granted. Subpoenaed third parties reserve all rights to object to the served discovery.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the tentative ruling via email to davididaho14@gmail.com

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
